speaker: Scheat
text: Welcome, new student.

speaker: Argo
text: *Awoo!*
The mysterious voice is deep and low, yet crystal-clear. *
I turn my head toward the direction the voice came from and see a winged silhouette.
Lord Scheat.

speaker: Argo
text: U-Um! It is an honor... to, uh... have an audience with you.

speaker: Scheat
text: Aah... There's no need to be so formal! Relax, make yourself comfortable! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Th-Thank you...

speaker: Scheat
text: I said relax. Come a bit closer. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ? Okay...

speaker: Unknown
text: When I move closer to the sound of his voice, I’m suddenly embraced by a set of huge arms.

speaker: Argo
text: Huh!?!

speaker: Scheat
text: *sniff* *sniff* *sniff*...
“Is that his nose? I can feel it rubbing on my neck.”
I have no idea what the hell he’s doing right now.

speaker: Scheat
text: ...! This is... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Y-Yes?

speaker: Scheat
text: The smell of fish...

speaker: Argo
text: What? Y-You mean me?

speaker: Scheat
text: It’s making me hungry… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: H-Haah...
“I smell like fish? I hope not…”
But is it possible the smell is still stuck to me despite leaving my village weeks ago?
Wait… It couldn’t be.

speaker: Argo
text: Wh-What are you doing?

speaker: Scheat
text: Hm? I’m just smelling you.

speaker: Argo
text: Okay...?

speaker: Scheat
text: Now let's continue...

speaker: Lord Scheat
text: wraps me in his arms again and slides a hand into my uniform.*

speaker: Argo
text: What the... Lord Scheat!?

speaker: Scheat
text: Hmm... I see... *sigh*
He touches me in various places, talking to himself each time he does as if he’s confirming something. *sigh*
Then, he moves on to a phase of testing that seems to involve his tongue. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Hmm... Oh... Very good... *sigh*
He licks various parts of my body and reacting in a seemingly strange way.

speaker: Argo
text: (Ugh…)
Just when I’m about to make a desperate attempt at pushing him back, Lord Scheat's "confirmation" finally ends. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: ……Hm! That was a nice response! *smile*

speaker: Argo
text: Huh...?. Response...? ?

speaker: Argo
text: ...You were looking for something, weren’t you? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: No, not really.

speaker: Argo
text: What… ? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Did you think that had some kind of meaning? Too bad! It didn't '! *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text:
The darkness, the isolated room, all that touching?
There was no reason for any of it.

speaker: Scheat
text: I was just… bored of normal meetings. It’s more fun this way, don't you think? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: I thought I would amuse myself by touching and licking the students and seeing how they react.

speaker: Argo
text: H-Huh...

speaker: Scheat
text: Besides, I already know all about you, you are Argo, from Oakley Village.

speaker: Argo
text: *Sigh*
He recognized me...? *A chill runs down my spine.*

speaker: Argo
text: Um... So does that mean you know about my ability too? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Your E.P.? Celio told me a few things, but I don’t know all the details. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: It is a unique ability only you have. I suggest you try to find out how you can make use of it.

speaker: Argo
text: ...When I asked Professor Celio about it, he said you were the one found me, right? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: I certainly was, but all I can see is the strength of your ability. I do not know how it works. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I see...

speaker: Scheat
text: But I can discuss it with you when I’m not busy. If you want to, that is.

speaker: Argo
text: What!? But... I don’t want to waste your time… *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: That’s why I said “when I’m not busy”.

speaker: Argo
text: But...

speaker: Scheat
text: “What don’t you understand!? I’m always free, so I’m telling you to come visit me!” *++*

speaker: Scheat
text: Every single day is so boring! That is why you must keep me company!

speaker: Argo
text: U-Uh...

speaker: Scheat
text: But if you do, I would rather it not be in this stuffy audience chamber. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: I have a private garden. We shall meet there.

speaker: Scheat
text: Your cards will let you know when I am there, correct?

speaker: Argo
text: Uh...

speaker: Argo
text: ...Yes, I think I understand.
...Come to think of it, there's always someone at the place cards I can choose.
I see, so I can use them like this for appointments?

speaker: Scheat
text: Good! I shall be waiting! *
...And so the audience comes to an end.
